name: media-bin
title: mcut Media Bin
description: Dropzone + picker import with Mediabunny probing, searchable asset grid, dnd-kit drag to the timeline.

files.content:
export {
  addTextAtPlayhead,
  allElementIds,
  clipEdges,
  duplicateElement,
  duplicateSelection,
  elementForAsset,
  elementForTextPreset,
  insertElementAtPlayhead,
  insertElementOnNewTrack,
  insertElementOnTrack,
  isSoloTrack,
  removeSelection,
  selectTrackElements,
  shuttle,
  splitAllAtPlayhead,
  splitSelectionAtPlayhead,
  TEXT_PRESETS,
  toggleMasterKeyframe,
  toggleSoloTrack,
  trackOfSelection,
  trimSelectionToPlayhead,
  unlinkElements,
  type TextPreset,
} from "@mcut/editor";
